Msg.msg_body: Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region

Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region (../task_detection_tpu/tpu_accel.cpp:395:9)
